summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Bull & Bear Trading Academy platform. All core features are working correctly including homepage, navigation, course categories, signals subscription, book details, admin login, and admin panel functionality.

design_issues.issue: Premium crown icons not consistently displayed across all pages

passed_tests: Backend API - All 18 endpoints working (100% success rate)
Homepage loads with hero section and market overview
Navigation between all pages (Home, Courses, Signals, Book, News)
Course categories display (Beginner, Advanced, Psychology, Risk Management, Technical Analysis)
Signals page shows subscription banner with $19.90/month pricing
Signals page displays 12 lock icons protecting premium content
Book page shows features list and pricing
Admin login works with provided credentials (admin@bullbear.com / admin123)
Admin link appears in navbar after login
Admin panel accessible with dashboard stats
Admin panel tabs work (Dashboard, Courses, Signals, News, Users)
Market data API returns MOCKED data for Forex, Crypto, Indices
Premium black & gold theme applied correctly
User registration and login system working
